---
title: "NDB"
output: html_document
date: "2026-02-03"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
list.files("../xlsx")
```

```{r}
list.files("../xlsx/oral")
```

```{r}
folder_name <- list.files("../xlsx/")

folder_path <- paste0("../xlsx/", folder_name)
```

```{r}
final_path <- do.call(paste0,
                      expand.grid(paste0(folder_path, "/"), c("dem", "prf", "mon", "sec")))
```



```{r}
df_n <- purrr::map(final_path, function(x){
  
  df <- tibble(FOLDER = x,
               n = list.files(x) %>% unique() %>% length())
  
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(TYPE = str_extract(FOLDER, "test|surg|inj|img"),
           CAT = str_extract(FOLDER, "dem|prf|mon|sec")) %>%
    select(!FOLDER) %>%
    relocate(n, .after= "CAT")
  
  return(df)
  
  }) %>% list_rbind() %>%  arrange(CAT)

df_n
```
